name: Fluffy Sitting Cat
subject: animals/cat
prompt: a fluffy cat sitting upright facing forward, tail curled neatly around its front paws, big round eyes, pointed ears, and long whiskers, a calm friendly expression

name: Sleeping Curled Cat
subject: animals/cat
prompt: a content cat curled up into a tight round ball fast asleep, eyes closed in a peaceful smile, tail wrapped over its nose, lying on a soft folded blanket

name: Kitten Playing with Yarn
subject: animals/cat
prompt: a playful kitten lying on its back batting at a ball of yarn with both front paws, a loose tangled thread looping around it, ears perked and an excited open-mouthed grin

name: Big-Eyed Kitten Portrait
subject: animals/cat
prompt: a close-up portrait of an adorable kitten's face filling the frame, enormous sparkling round eyes, a tiny triangle nose, big soft ears, and long fine whiskers fanning out to each side

name: Cat in the Window
subject: animals/cat
prompt: a cat sitting on a windowsill looking outside, a framed window with a potted plant beside it, a curtain draped to one side, a moon and a couple of stars visible in the night sky outdoors

name: Tabby Cat Stretching
subject: animals/cat
prompt: a tabby cat in a long downward stretch, front legs reaching far forward and back arched up high, tail raised, striped fur pattern along its back, eyes squeezed shut in a satisfied yawn

name: Cat in a Basket
subject: animals/cat
prompt: a chubby cat nestled inside a round woven basket with only its head, front paws, and curled tail peeking over the rim, a small cushion underneath, a relaxed sleepy smile

name: Mother Cat and Kitten
subject: animals/cat
prompt: a gentle mother cat sitting beside her small kitten and leaning down to lick the top of its head, the kitten looking up happily, both with soft fur and loving expressions

name: Cat Chasing a Butterfly
subject: animals/cat
prompt: a curious cat up on its hind legs reaching a front paw toward a butterfly fluttering just above its head, a few flowers and blades of grass at its feet, an eager playful look

name: Cute Cat Face
subject: animals/cat
prompt: a simple round cartoon cat face with big chunky outlines, two large dot eyes, a tiny nose and smiling mouth, three short whiskers on each side, and two pointed ears on top, very easy for little hands

name: Cat with a Bow Tie
subject: animals/cat
prompt: a proud cat sitting tall wearing a fancy bow tie and a small collar with a round bell, fur neatly groomed, chest puffed out, a cheerful confident expression

name: Cat Loafing in the Garden
subject: animals/cat
prompt: a relaxed cat sitting in loaf position with all four paws tucked under its body, resting among garden flowers, tall grass, and a butterfly nearby, eyes half closed and content
